session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
**PR #9119: Fix: Dashboard missing PRs — introduce `erk-core` label** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9119
## Changes Summary
### New label: `erk-core` - Added `ERK_CORE_LABEL = "erk-core"` constant in `src/erk/cli/constants.py` - Added label definition (`"Core work PR (plan or code)"`, color `0E8A16`) in `objective_issues.py` - Added to both `get_erk_label_definitions()` and `get_required_erk_labels()` - Added to `_ensure_labels_exist()` for auto-creation
### Label assignment at PR creation - `plan_save.py`: Non-learn plans get `erk-core` - `create_cmd.py`: Plan PRs get `erk-core` - `create_pr_from_session.py`: Session-created PRs get `erk-core` - `one_shot_remote_dispatch.py`: One-shot plans get `erk-core` - `submit_pipeline.py`: Code PRs (non-plan) get `erk-core` via `label_code_pr`
### Dashboard/CLI queries updated - `PLANS_VIEW` (TUI tab 1): Now queries `("erk-core",)` instead of `("erk-pr",)` with `exclude_labels=("erk-learn",)` — no client-side filtering needed - `pr list` default: `("erk-core",)` instead of `("erk-pr",)` - `dash` default: `("erk-core",)` instead of `("erk-pr",)` - `dash-data` default: `("erk-core",)` instead of `("erk-pr",)`
### Performance improvement - Default `per_page` increased from 30 to 100 in `PlannedPRPlanListService`
### Documentation - Updated `docs/learned/planning/label-scheme.md` with new taxonomy
### Tests updated - 20+ test files updated to include `erk-core` in fake Plan data - New tests for `erk-core` label definition and required labels - All 5984 tests passing
